methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
WB Group is a pre-IPO-stage company in the Defense & Security sector. The comparable universe consists of 21 same-sector peers: 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms. Top private comparables include Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI.

The peer-median method is not applicable to this analysis. A narrow peer set filtered by stage, adjacency, and valuation tier yielded fewer than three datapoints, falling short of the minimum threshold for triangulation. While the Defense & Security sector contains 21 total peers, none satisfy the combined criteria of same-stage and similar-tier positioning required for meaningful median benchmarking. Applying an all-sector median would introduce material distortion given the heterogeneity of company profiles, growth profiles, and risk factors across the broader Defense & Security landscape.

Given the inapplicability of peer-median triangulation and the absence of other quantitative anchors in the provided dataset, no specific valuation range can be supported. A defensible assessment would require either (1) expansion of comparable data within the stage/tier filters, (2) application of alternative methods such as DCF with disclosed financials, or (3) transaction multiples from recent fundings. The primary uncertainty remains the lack of sufficient same-stage peers with disclosed valuation metrics in this subsector.
